ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance test */,
  "workload_type" TEXT /* Type of workload being simulated (e.g., FSLogix caching) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test case */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for easy filtering and categorization */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test case is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "write_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each write metric record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test case */,
  "write_iop_avg" REAL /* Average write IOPS */,
  "write_iop_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of write IOPS */,
  "recommended_write" REAL /* Recommended IOPS sizing for writing */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used to calculate the metrics */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metrics (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_write_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "read_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read metric record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test case */,
  "read_iop_avg" REAL /* Average read IOPS */,
  "read_iop_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of read IOPS */,
  "recommended_read" REAL /* Recommended IOPS sizing for reading */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used to calculate the metrics */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metrics (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_read_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test case */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the test result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Number of passed test cases */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed test cases */,
  "skipped" INTEGER /* Number of skipped test cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the individual conducting the tests */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., test executed, metrics updated) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., test case name, metric values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test case */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., cache size, block size) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case history entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test case */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case tag */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test case */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., knowledge-worker, caching) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_tags_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
